name: LLM Trace → Phoenix (OTLP_gRPC)
description: Send all LLM input/output traces natively via standard OTLP gRPC protocol to Arize Phoenix.

phoenixGrpcUrl.description: Phoenix OTLP gRPC endpoint URL (default: http://localhost:4317)

projectName.description: Phoenix project name to group traces under (default: openclaw)

phoenixGrpcUrl.label: Phoenix OTLP gRPC URL
phoenixGrpcUrl.help: Target URL of your Phoenix OTLP gRPC endpoint

projectName.label: Project Name
projectName.help: Project name shown in Phoenix UI for grouping traces
